message:
feat(web): Complete sharing API endpoints implementation

- POST /api/share - create share links with password and expiration support
- GET /api/share/:code - retrieve shared content (returns requiresPassword for protected links)
- POST /api/share/:code/verify - verify password and return protected content
- PUT /api/share/:code - update share link password/expiration
- DELETE /api/share/:code - revoke share links
- GET /api/share/mine - list user's share links

Also includes:
- In-memory share link store with view tracking
- Duplicate /api/share-links routes for backwards compatibility
- Fixed Next.js 16 async params types in all route handlers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
